expectations.text: Identifies '200mA current range' meter instruction as a critical error (should be resistance/ohms range)
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 1: 'Set your meter to the 200mA current range.' — correctly flagged with fix 'Set your meter to resistance mode (200Ω or 2kΩ range).'

expectations.text: Flags 5V relay coil resistance '10-30 ohms' as a critical error (correct range is 50-150 ohms)
expectations.evidence: Critical Error 2: 'For 5V relays, coil resistance runs 10–30Ω.' — correctly flagged with fix '50–150Ω'

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report has '## Critical Errors', '## Fact-Check Items', and '## Clean' sections
Findings numbered 1–4 sequentially without restarting between sections

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: Report ends with the standard Apply fixes prompt with all four options

notes: Also flagged flyback diode 1N4001 PIV adequacy (Fact-Check 4) — a legitimate secondary concern not injected as a test error
